manual_testing_steps: Run `Copilot-RalphInitialize-Feature.ps1 -Story 'Test story'` — verify existing behavior is unchanged.
Run `Copilot-RalphInitialize-Feature.ps1` (no arguments) — verify a clear error message is shown.
Run with `-WorkItemId 1234 -Project MyProject -Org https://dev.azure.com/myorg` and verify the ADO-aware prompt is passed to Copilot CLI.
